form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.13) in a Free For All, finishing a 7 length seventh. Strong record off the draw with six wins and four minors from 14 starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.13) in a Free For All, finishing a 7 length seventh. Strong record off the draw with six wins and four minors from 14 starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on January 28 at this track over 366m. Last start was second over 366m in 20.22, behind Oscar Bravo. Has clocked a superb 19.73 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Q Lakeside then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (20.34) at this track. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

formComments.comment: Was a winner three back at Q Lakeside then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (20.34) at this track. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a win (29.89) over 520m at Q Parklands 11 weeks ago. Drawn the squeeze box but can feature with a clean break.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when second (30.32) over 520m at Q Parklands. Squeeze draw to overcome. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 15 over 366m at this track in a OPEN. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.25 lengths over 366m at this track in a handy (19.92), beating Bye Bye Taipan. In form and is right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 2.25 lengths over 366m at this track in a handy (19.92), beating Bye Bye Taipan. In form and is right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Extra Voltage beaten 7 lengths (25.88). Has run hot time here with a 19.49 PB at the distance. Key chance.
